name: Savory Seafood Cheesecake
recipeIngredient: 1/2 cup Thin wheat crackers, finely crushed
2 cans 6.5-oz. Mincemeat (Clams, Shrimp or Crabmeat), drained
recipeInstructions:
1. Preheat the oven to 300°F.
2. In a small bowl, combine cracker crumbs and butter; set aside.
3. Butter a 1.5-quart dish or ovenproof mixing bowl; line the bottom with a circle of wax paper; butter the wax paper; set aside.
4. In a food processor fitted with a metal blade, finely chop onion.
5. Add cream cheese, mince (clams, shrimp, or crabmeat), eggs, sour cream, cheddar cheese, dill, salt, and hot pepper sauce to the food processor; process until smooth, about 45 seconds.
6. Pour the mixture into the prepared dish; sprinkle with reserved cracker crumbs.
7. Place the dish in a roasting pan. Fill the roasting pan with boiling water to a depth of 2 inches.
8. Bake until a knife inserted into the cheesecake 1 inch from the center comes out clean, about 1 hour.
9. Turn off the oven; let the cheesecake remain in the oven for 30 minutes.
10. Cool on a wire rack to room temperature, about 1 hour.
11. Cover and refrigerate until cold, 4 hours or overnight.
12. To unmold, run a metal spatula or long knife along the edge of the pan; invert onto a serving plate; remove wax paper; garnish with lemon slices and dill sprigs if desired.
